name: @vellumai/assistant-api
description: Public API surface for consumers of the assistant daemon (web client, gateway, evals, etc.). Source-of-truth lives here; consumers in the same repo resolve via tsconfig path mapping rather than via a published artifact.
//dependencies: Source-as-package declarative dep list: consumers in the same repo must provide a copy of each name here in their own `node_modules`. The consumer's postinstall symlinks them into `assistant/src/api/node_modules/` so standard node walk-up resolves them when the source-as-package files are imported. Adding a dep here is the single source of truth — no other config needs to change.
